title: Umirim Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Umirim with a Z-Score of +3.29. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave in Umirim is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.5 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 79%, and the wind speed is 8.3 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
